testcase.name: test_no_grade_filter_returns_all_content

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 7 content items without grade filter, got 9 assert 9 == 7 + where 9 = len([{'content_data': {'pdf_url': '/api/uploads/pdfs/bfc84fb5209b4ff2.pdf'}, 'content_id': 'content_d08ee5937d95', 'content_type': 'book', 'created_at': '2026-02-07T08:42:22.687342+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'html_folder': '25d6955864674a2f', 'html_url': '/api/uploads/activities/25d6955864674a2f/story.html'}, 'content_id': 'content_90108cb5e262', 'content_type': 'book', 'created_at': '2026-02-10T07:24:02.826708+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'pdf_url': '/api/uploads/pdfs/dabe07a1b6104ad6.pdf'}, 'content_id': 'content_d65261165daf', 'content_type': 'workbook', 'created_at': '2026-02-10T04:41:35.603889+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'html_folder': '00af84aa5b234a41', 'html_url': '/api/uploads/activities/00af84aa5b234a41/index.html'}, 'content_id': 'content_ddc1142444ec', 'content_type': 'activity', 'created_at': '2026-02-07T08:56:11.990148+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'pdf_url': '/api/uploads/pdfs/54bead873f7a4185.pdf'}, 'content_id': 'content_86cc2c845e42', 'content_type': 'worksheet', 'created_at': '2026-02-07T16:18:22.807964+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'html_folder': 'c48dcc70dc2845cd', 'html_url': '/api/uploads/activities/c48dcc70dc2845cd/index.html'}, 'content_id': 'content_8fc8553432a7', 'content_type': 'activity', 'created_at': '2026-02-07T09:03:40.289821+00:00', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_grade_filtering.py:122: in test_no_grade_filter_returns_all_content assert len(content_items) == 7, f"Expected 7 content items without grade filter, got {len(content_items)}" E AssertionError: Expected 7 content items without grade filter, got 9 E assert 9 == 7 E + where 9 = len([{'content_data': {'pdf_url': '/api/uploads/pdfs/bfc84fb5209b4ff2.pdf'}, 'content_id': 'content_d08ee5937d95', 'content_type': 'book', 'created_at': '2026-02-07T08:42:22.687342+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'html_folder': '25d6955864674a2f', 'html_url': '/api/uploads/activities/25d6955864674a2f/story.html'}, 'content_id': 'content_90108cb5e262', 'content_type': 'book', 'created_at': '2026-02-10T07:24:02.826708+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'pdf_url': '/api/uploads/pdfs/dabe07a1b6104ad6.pdf'}, 'content_id': 'content_d65261165daf', 'content_type': 'workbook', 'created_at': '2026-02-10T04:41:35.603889+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'html_folder': '00af84aa5b234a41', 'html_url': '/api/uploads/activities/00af84aa5b234a41/index.html'}, 'content_id': 'content_ddc1142444ec', 'content_type': 'activity', 'created_at': '2026-02-07T08:56:11.990148+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'pdf_url': '/api/uploads/pdfs/54bead873f7a4185.pdf'}, 'content_id': 'content_86cc2c845e42', 'content_type': 'worksheet', 'created_at': '2026-02-07T16:18:22.807964+00:00', ...}, {'content_data': {'html_folder': 'c48dcc70dc2845cd', 'html_url': '/api/uploads/activities/c48dcc70dc2845cd/index.html'}, 'content_id': 'content_8fc8553432a7', 'content_type': 'activity', 'created_at': '2026-02-07T09:03:40.289821+00:00', ...}, ...])
